context: Tests whether the Mermaid diagrams skill helps an agent complete the class-package-model scenario while following diagram type, syntax, semantic, renderer, safety, and claim-discipline guidance relevant to the task.

checklist.name: Uses class diagram syntax
checklist.description: Uses Mermaid classDiagram syntax rather than an ER diagram or flowchart.

checklist.name: Models all requested classes
checklist.description: Includes Skill, ReferenceFile, EvalScenario, HarnessAdapter, and Package as classes or clearly equivalent class names.

checklist.name: Shows required relationships
checklist.description: Represents Skill-to-ReferenceFile as one-to-many loading, EvalScenario-to-Skill as exactly one tested skill, HarnessAdapter-to-Skill as exposure, and Package ownership of one Skill plus many HarnessAdapters.

checklist.name: Includes useful class details
checklist.description: Includes concise attributes such as name, description, path, platform, or id without inventing excessive fields.

checklist.name: Assumptions note
checklist.description: Includes one brief assumptions sentence outside the diagram.
